md_worklist.subject: Quick question about my appointment
md_worklist.rationale: Active self-harm ideation in postpartum period requires immediate safety assessment

md_worklist.subject: Not feeling movement
md_worklist.rationale: Absent fetal movement since yesterday at 26 weeks is a potential fetal emergency
Severe headache with visual disturbances at 33 weeks are classic signs of preeclampsia

md_worklist.subject: Heavy bleeding
md_worklist.rationale: Soaking a pad hourly for 3 hours postpartum indicates possible hemorrhage

md_worklist.subject: Trouble breathing
md_worklist.rationale: New chest tightness and dyspnea on exertion at 8 weeks postpartum raises concern for PE or cardiac event

md_worklist.subject: Sertraline
md_worklist.rationale: Sertraline dose adjustment request in perinatal patient warrants timely clinical review

refill.reason_text: Dose change requested; requires prescriber judgment.

md_worklist.subject: Refill request
md_worklist.rationale: Antihypertensive refill in a perinatal patient should not be delayed to avoid lapse in BP control

refill.reason_text: Medication is not on the RN standing-order protocol list.

md_worklist.subject: New medication
md_worklist.rationale: New supplement request for leg cramps is non-urgent and can be reviewed routinely

refill.reason_text: New medication / first fill; requires prescriber review.

md_worklist.subject: Vitamin refill
md_worklist.rationale: Routine prenatal vitamin refill with no changes reported

refill.reason_text: No qualifying recent visit on file; needs a prescriber touch first.

md_worklist.subject: Latch question
md_worklist.rationale: Mild nipple soreness with lactation visit already scheduled is a routine question
Mild cold symptoms without fever; safe OTC medication guidance is a routine inquiry

rn_queue.subject: Refill
rn_queue.rationale: Routine prenatal vitamin refill with no changes reported

refill.reason_text: Straight protocol refill; eligible for RN standing-order handling.

rn_queue.subject: Refill + thanks
rn_queue.rationale: Routine prenatal vitamin refill with no changes reported

refill.reason_text: Straight protocol refill; eligible for RN standing-order handling.

admin_queue.subject: Reschedule
admin_queue.rationale: Elective rescheduling of anatomy scan with no clinical urgency indicated

admin_queue.subject: Billing
admin_queue.rationale: Insurance billing dispute is an administrative matter with no clinical urgency

admin_queue.subject: Portal access
admin_queue.rationale: Portal login/access reset is an administrative IT issue with no clinical urgency
